agent.root_goal: Create a complete business plan for a Korean local-review platform: market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market, and financial projections.
agent.task: Create a complete business plan for a Korean local-review platform: market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market, and financial projections.

agent.root_goal: Create a complete business plan for a Korean local-review platform: market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market, and financial projections.
agent.task: Create a complete business plan for a Korean local-review platform: market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market, and financial projections.

action.reasoning: The task of creating a complete business plan is complex and naturally decomposes into five distinct, largely independent sections: market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market strategy, and financial projections. These sections can be developed in parallel by separate agents, as they rely on general knowledge of the Korean market rather than sequential data dependencies. Spawning five subtasks allows for concurrent execution and efficient use of the budget.

subtasks.goal: Conduct a market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask analyzes the size, growth, and trends of the local review and O2O (Online-to-Offline) market in South Korea. It provides the foundational context for the business plan by identifying target demographics and market opportunities.

outputs.description: Detailed market analysis including TAM/SAM/SOM, growth trends, and user behavior in Korea.

subtasks.goal: Perform a competitor analysis of existing Korean local-review platforms.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask identifies key competitors like Naver Place, Google Maps, and specialized apps, analyzing their strengths, weaknesses, and market share. It helps define the competitive landscape and potential differentiation strategies for the new platform.

outputs.description: Competitor analysis including feature comparison, SWOT analysis, and market positioning.

subtasks.goal: Design a revenue model for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask defines how the platform will generate income, exploring options like advertising, premium listings, affiliate marketing, and data services. It establishes the economic viability of the business.

outputs.description: Detailed revenue model including pricing strategies, monetization channels, and value propositions for advertisers.

subtasks.goal: Develop a go-to-market strategy for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask outlines the launch strategy, user acquisition channels, marketing tactics, and partnership opportunities specific to the Korean market. It details how the platform will gain initial traction and scale.

outputs.description: Go-to-market strategy including launch phases, marketing channels, user acquisition costs, and partnership plans.

subtasks.goal: Create financial projections for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask builds a 3-5 year financial forecast including revenue, expenses, cash flow, and break-even analysis. It provides the quantitative basis for investment decisions and operational planning.

outputs.description: Financial projections including P&L, cash flow, balance sheet assumptions, and key metrics like CAC and LTV.
